Summary
Results-driven software engineer with 5 years of experience building scalable web applications and distributed systems.

Experience

Acme Corp — Senior Software Engineer — Jan 2022 - Present
- Architected and deployed a microservices platform handling 10M+ daily requests using Python and FastAPI
- Reduced API response times by 35% through query optimization and Redis caching layer implementation
- Led migration from monolithic architecture to event-driven microservices using Kafka and Docker
- Mentored 3 junior engineers through code reviews and pair programming sessions
- Implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions reducing deployment time from 2 hours to 15 minutes

TechStart Inc — Software Engineer — Jun 2019 - Dec 2021
- Built real-time data processing pipeline using Apache Spark handling 500GB daily data volume
- Developed RESTful APIs serving 50+ internal and external clients with 99.9% uptime
- Designed and implemented PostgreSQL database schemas for multi-tenant SaaS platform
- Collaborated with product team to deliver 12 features over 6 sprint cycles ahead of schedule
- Created automated testing framework increasing code coverage from 45% to 89%

Education

State University — B.S. Computer Science — 2015-2019
- Relevant coursework: Distributed Systems, Database Design, Machine Learning
- Senior capstone project: Built a recommendation engine using collaborative filtering

Skills
Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Go, SQL, FastAPI, Django, React, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, GitHub Actions, Terraform, Apache Spark, REST APIs, Microservices, CI/CD
